message:
refactor(db): simplify test queries and database initialization

- Remove diagnostic COUNT/SUM queries from schema test that logged
  thread coverage stats and null thread_id checks
- Simplify message queries in schema tests: remove thread_id filtering
  and ORDER BY clauses where not needed for test assertions
- Convert importance filter to parameterized query for consistency
- Replace complex in-memory database naming scheme (AtomicUsize counter
  with file:test_recipes_N?mode=memory&cache=shared URIs) with simpler
  DbConn::open_memory() calls, giving each test an isolated in-memory
  database instead of cache-shared instances

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
